name: Eufaula Community Center
description: Come play pickleball at Eufaula Community Center in Eufaula, AL! There are 11 asphalt and concrete courts. 8 are outdoors and 3 are indoors. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Players have access to restrooms, water, lights, and wheelchair accessibility. The courts are free.
open_play_schedule: The indoor use schedule is variable for the reason stated in the opening narrative description above.
